prestazioni: Engine: 6.4L HEMI Apache (E-SG) V8 with forged internals including Manley I-beam connecting rods, JE 11:1 forged pistons, and a billet crankshaft from Callies Compstar. Supercharged with a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger (12 psi boost) paired with a custom intercooler core from CXRacing (4.5" thick, 1200 CFM airflow). Fuel system upgraded with Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, Aeromotive A1000 fuel pump, and a Fore Innovations 450 LPH surge tank.

Drivetrain: Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission with a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch (ceramic puck) and a Quaife ATB differential (35-spline). Custom driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop (3.5" aluminum, 1350 series U-joints) to handle increased torque.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for Charger 500 chassis), BMR Fabrication tubular K-member, and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension. Braking system features Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (355mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny V3 kit (custom-fitted for Charger 500 wheelbase) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Front bumper replaced with a custom AGS Designs unit featuring integrated DRLs and a central tow hook.
Wheels: Forgeline GA3R 20x10.5" (front) and 20x12" (rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/20 front, 315/30/20 rear). Custom center-lock adapters from Weld Racing for quick swaps.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Katzkin (headliner, door cards, and dashboard) with custom embroidery (Charger 500 script). Roll cage from Autopower (8-point, bolt-in) with Sparco Pro 2000 seats (fixed-back) and Schroth 6-point harnesses. Custom gauge cluster from AEM (X-Series digital dash) with integrated boost, AFR, and oil pressure readouts.
